word: H2834 - חָשַׂף - châsaph - khaw-saf' - Make bare

sections.paragraph:
Original: חשׂף

Transliteration: châśaph

Phonetic: khaw-saf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to strip, strip off, lay bare, make bare, draw out
    1. (Qal)
      1. to strip off
      2. to strip, lay bare
      3. to draw (water), skim, take from the surface

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 766

Part(s) of speech: Verb
